definition: Momentum-quality inter-factor correlation has tripled from +0.15-0.25 to +0.50-0.60, meaning multi-factor portfolios holding both are running approximately 2x intended AI exposure with no diversification benefit between these factors.
evidence: Multi-factor portfolios running ~2x intended AI exposure
Diversification benefit between momentum and quality factors has collapsed
open_questions: Whether factor decorrelation could occur gradually or requires a shock
Impact on risk parity and factor-neutral strategies at scale
